moments.author: Jaylen Brown
moments.quote: Still processing how this all went down… excited and disappointed at the same time.
moments.why: A blockbuster trade ending his 10‑year Celtics era—this raw reaction drove massive conversation.

moments.author: Shams Charania
moments.quote: BLOCKBUSTER: The Boston Celtics have agreed to trade Jaylen Brown to the Philadelphia 76ers…
moments.why: His scoop broke one of the hottest NBA trades of the season.

moments.author: Shams Charania
moments.quote: Just in: Free agent forward Tobias Harris has agreed to a two‑year, $31 million deal with the San Antonio Spurs.
moments.why: Major veteran pickup for the Spurs; stirred big free‑agency buzz.

moments.author: Bleacher Report
moments.quote: BREAKING: Celtics have agreed to trade Jaylen Brown to the 76ers for a package centered around Paul George.
moments.why: Top sports media spilling explosive trade details in real time.

moments.author: Bleacher Report
moments.quote: Tobias Harris has agreed to a two‑year, $31 million deal with the San Antonio Spurs, per @ShamsCharania
moments.why: High‑profile free agent signing trending among NBA fans.
